programmes.show_description: Undercover Asia examines the Hong Kong protests through the lens of those caught in the middle: The police force, once Asia's finest, now - the most hated.
No further information...
For decades, China has been hit by natural disasters like typhoons, earthquakes, and floods. A group of ordinary citizens step into the disaster zones with the hope that more can be saved.
In Metro Manila, citizens form fire brigades to fight fires in vulnerable communities. They operate under uniquely challenging circumstances, becoming the unsung heroes of their communities.
No further information...
Explore Bencoolen's cool factor, the craft behind curry puffs, a cross-cultural love story, and the best matchday bites near Jalan Besar Stadium.

India has become one of the leading space-faring nations, at a time when the superpower space race is heating up. Can India's space sector take off, or will it be a failure to launch?
In 2018 China stops importing recyclables, creating global chaos and flooding Southeast Asian countries with unwanted plastic. For Indonesia, battling its own waste problems, is this the last straw?
No further information...

A worldwide scramble for rare earth metals broke out. Just why does China have such a grip on them? And why the worry? Well we need them not just for iPhones, but for everything electric in our lives.
